name: Cottman cash for gold
description_short: Family-owned Philadelphia pawn shop buying gold, silver, diamonds, coins, watches, antiques, and vintage cars for immediate cash since 1985.
description_long:
Cottman Cash for Gold is a family-owned pawn shop located at 2444 Cottman Avenue in Philadelphia, PA, directly across from Roosevelt Mall. The business has operated for over 40 years in the precious metals and collectibles buying space, establishing itself as a local fixture for customers needing quick cash.

The shop buys a diverse range of items including gold, platinum, silver, diamonds, coins, high-end watches, antiques, and vintage cars. Customers receive cash on the spot for their items. The business advertises daily precious metal pricing (gold at $4,397.05/oz and silver at $68.17/oz on their website) and claims to weigh and test all items in front of customers as part of their transparent evaluation process.

Cottman distinguishes itself through claims of family ownership, 40+ years of industry experience, and an emphasis on honest dealing and professionalism. The website emphasizes that they handle items with respect and provide friendly customer service. Their convenient location near a major mall and accessible phone contact (+1 215-335-2300) are marketed as advantages.

As a pawn shop, the primary caveat is that this business model is transactional and extractive—customers are selling items at market-adjusted prices set by the shop. While the website makes claims about fair pricing and honesty, there is no independent verification of their valuations, buyback terms, or actual pricing competitiveness. No customer reviews, ratings, or third-party validation are present on the website. The business does not offer loans or credit products, only direct purchase of items.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 40+ years of stated industry experience in precious metals and collectibles
Multiple item categories accepted (gold, silver, diamonds, coins, watches, antiques, vintage cars)
Claims to weigh and test items in front of customers for transparency
Same-day cash payment (no waiting period mentioned)
Convenient location across from Roosevelt Mall in Philadelphia
Family-owned business model emphasizing personal service
cons: No independent verification of pricing fairness or competitiveness against other buyers
No customer reviews, ratings, or third-party validation available on website
Limited operating hours (closed Sundays, weekday closes at 5:30 PM, Saturday at 4 PM)
Pawn shop model inherently means customers receive less than retail/replacement value
No online appraisal tool or price quotes available—must visit in person
best_for: Philadelphia-area residents needing immediate cash for unused jewelry or precious metals
Collectors with vintage cars, antiques, or high-end watches to liquidate quickly
People seeking transparent in-person evaluation with weight and test verification
diagnosis: Best for Philadelphia residents needing immediate cash for jewelry, precious metals, or collectibles who value in-person evaluation and transparent testing. Primary caveat: pricing is set unilaterally by the shop with no market comparison available, and customers should expect to receive significantly less than retail or replacement value—this is fundamentally a transactional pawn model, not a loan or credit product.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
